2606.22110.title: TraceView: Interactive Visualization of Agentic Program Repair Trajectories
2606.22110.paper_summary: LLM-based automated program repair (APR) agents generate patches to fix software bugs with minimal human intervention. These agents often produce long trajectories of reasoning, tool use, and feedback to produce candidate patches. Final patch outcomes show whether a repair attempt succeeded or failed, but they do not show how the agent reached that outcome, or where the process became repetitive or misaligned with the task. This makes agentic repair failures difficult to diagnose, reproduce, and prevent. To help developers address these challenges, we present TraceView, an interactive tool for labeling and visualizing repair trajectories from APR systems. TraceView organizes raw and pre-labeled agentic runs with Thought, Action, and Result components to support semantic relation labeling and diagnosis, and renders the resulting trajectory as graph views. Furthermore, TraceView provides relation filters, patch outcome summaries, metrics, and node-level evidence panels to help users inspect how reasoning, actions, and feedback connect across the various steps of an agentic repair attempt. We evaluate TraceView with five researchers through a survey-based user study. Participants reported that TraceView made trajectories easier to scan and that its overview-to-detail workflow helped them better understand repair behavior. The TraceView source code is available at https://github.com/SOAR-Lab/agent-traj-visualization. A screencast of TraceView is available at https://youtu.be/9ZCh7Ifj2AQ.
2606.22110.paper_summary_zh: LLM 基於的自動程式修復 (APR) 代理生成修補程式以修復軟體錯誤，並且需要最少的人為干預。這些代理通常產生長時間的推理、工具使用和反饋，以生成候選修補程式。最終的修補結果顯示修復嘗試是成功還是失敗，但它們並不顯示代理如何達到該結果，或過程中何時變得重複或與任務不一致。這使得代理修復失敗難以診斷、重現和預防。為了幫助開發者解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 TraceView，一個用於標記和可視化 APR 系統修復軌跡的互動工具。TraceView 組織原始和預標記的代理運行，包含思考、行動和結果組件，以支持語義關係標記和診斷，並將結果軌跡呈現為圖形視圖。此外，TraceView 還提供關係過濾器、修補結果摘要、指標和節點級證據面板，以幫助用戶檢查推理、行動和反饋如何在代理修復嘗試的各個步驟中相互連接。我們通過基於調查的用戶研究，與五位研究人員評估了 TraceView。參與者報告說，TraceView 使軌跡更容易掃描，並且其概覽到詳細的工作流程幫助他們更好地理解修復行為。TraceView 的源代碼可在 https://github.com/SOAR-Lab/agent-traj-visualization 獲得。TraceView 的螢幕錄像可在 https://youtu.be/9ZCh7Ifj2AQ 獲得。
2606.22110.author: Amirali Sajadi et.al.
2606.22110.authors: Amirali Sajadi, Tu Nguyen, Kimmie Huynh, Esteban Parra, Preetha Chatterjee
